description_long: This is a two-story rustic log cabin with a weathered, gable roof and a prominent stone chimney. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a traditional, sturdy appearance. The front facade features a covered porch with wooden railings, a balcony above, and a large garage door, suggesting a blend of residential and utility functions. Several wooden crates and pallets are scattered around the perimeter, adding to the utilitarian, lived-in feel. Windows are small, rectangular, and asymmetrically placed, with simple wooden shutters on some. A wooden ladder leans against one side, and the overall structure is elevated slightly above a wooden platform base.
description: A two-story rustic log cabin with a gable roof, stone chimney, covered porch, balcony, and scattered wooden crates and pallets.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, covered porch, balcony, garage door, and several wooden crates and pallets.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the log wall construction, balcony, and additional crates and pallets, with the gable roof and chimney visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the log wall with minimal openings, a protruding balcony, and a supporting beam, with fewer visible crates.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals a wooden ladder, two small shuttered windows, and more crates and pallets near the base.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and a central stone chimney, covered in weathered shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement of small, rectangular windows; two on the right side, one on the front above the porch, and one on the balcony, with some featuring simple wooden shutters
attribute_door_placement: One main door on the front facade beneath the porch, a large garage door adjacent to it, and a possible balcony door above
